problem: Can addiction-related neural pathway changes be reversed without withdrawal?
mechanism: Vagus nerve stimulation modulating brain-gut axis
hypothesis: The key to Can addiction-related neural pathway changes be reversed without withdrawal? is Vagus nerve stimulation modulating brain-gut axis — specifically Vagus nerve stimulation — which would help 21,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: Optogenetic mouse model with 22 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
